# AI Compliance Reference

> Regulatory background for AI risk compliance. For implementation rules and code examples, see `.cursor/skills/ai-compliance/SKILL.md`.

## Files

- [regulations.md](regulations.md): Global AI regulatory framework (EU AI Act, US state laws, South Korea)

## Quick Reference

- Risk framework: EU AI Act 4-tier risk classification
- Key deadline: 2026-08-02 (EU AI Act high-risk + transparency obligations)
- Jurisdictions: EU, US-Federal, US-CA, US-CO, US-TX, KR
- Skill: `.cursor/skills/ai-compliance/SKILL.md`
